diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -70,15 +70,11 @@
     

     ckpt_dir = os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint)

     candidates = [args.checkpoint]

-    # Only include the best 3 ConvNeXt models (cnxt4 hurt ensemble)

+    # Best 3-model ensemble: best.pt + cnxt2 + cnxt3

     for name in ['cnxt2.pt', 'cnxt3.pt']:

         p = os.path.join(ckpt_dir, name)

         if os.path.exists(p) and p not in candidates:

             candidates.append(p)

-    # Optionally include cnxt5 if exists

-    p5 = os.path.join(ckpt_dir, 'cnxt5.pt')

-    if os.path.exists(p5) and p5 not in candidates:

-        candidates.append(p5)

     

     print(f"Ensembling: {candidates}")

     total = None
